mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO server_metric_202604 ( server_id, cpu_usage, cpu_load_1m, cpu_load_5m, cpu_load_15m, memory_used, memory_total, memory_usage, disk_data, network_data, process_count, collect_time, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.serverId}, #{item.cpuUsage}, #{item.cpuLoad1m}, #{item.cpuLoad5m}, #{item.cpuLoad15m}, #{item.memoryUsed}, #{item.memoryTotal}, #{item.memoryUsage}, #{item.diskData}, #{item.networkData}, #{item.processCount}, #{item.collectTime}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT sm.server_id AS serverId, si.server_name AS serverName, sm.cpu_usage AS value, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(sm.collect_time) AS collectTime FROM server_metric_202604 sm INNER JOIN server_info si ON sm.server_id = si.id WHERE sm.collect_time = ( SELECT MAX(collect_time) FROM server_metric_202604 WHERE server_id = sm.server_id ) ORDER BY sm.cpu_usage DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT sm.server_id AS serverId, si.server_name AS serverName, sm.memory_usage AS value, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(sm.collect_time) AS collectTime FROM server_metric_202604 sm INNER JOIN server_info si ON sm.server_id = si.id WHERE sm.collect_time = ( SELECT MAX(collect_time) FROM server_metric_202604 WHERE server_id = sm.server_id ) ORDER BY sm.memory_usage DESC LIMIT #{limit}
